creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you checked plist?

diff --git a/devel/jetbrains-phpstorm/pkg-plist b/devel/jetbrains-phpstorm/pkg-plist
index ec1149d826d0..9209724b7834 100644
--- a/devel/jetbrains-phpstorm/pkg-plist
+++ b/devel/jetbrains-phpstorm/pkg-plist
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+/you/have/to/check/what/makeplist/gives/you
 bin/phpstorm
 man/man1/phpstorm.1.gz
 share/applications/phpstorm.desktop
